EnhancedContent:
The security manager role can no longer enable or disable GitHub Code Quality for a repository unless they are also an administrator for that repository. Only repository administrators can enable or disable GitHub Code Quality in a repository.

This change keeps the permissions of the security manager role focused on security-related products, following the principle of least privilege.

To learn more about enabling or disabling GitHub Code Quality, see the documentation for [managing GitHub Code Quality settings](https://docs.github.com/enterprise-cloud@latest/code-security/how-tos/maintain-quality-code/enable-code-quality).

![social](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/648752f4-ce5e-4526-83f0-c7cb9a422bd7)
Author: Allison

Title: Code Quality permissions removed from security manager role
